name: BelieversFlow v2.2.0
body:
## ✝ BelieversFlow v2.2.0

**Full Bible Reader + Visible Delete/Undo!**

### What's New
- 📖 **Full Bible Reader** — Read all 66 books of the Bible (OT/NT), chapter navigation, localStorage caching for offline, recent reads tracker
- 🗑 **Visible Delete buttons** — Red delete buttons with 🗑 emoji on all tasks and diary entries
- ↩️ **Undo support** — Undo deleted tasks and diary entries within 6 seconds via prominent toast button

### Previous Features
- 📓 Diary/Journal with mood picker, edit/delete
- 📖 Bible Version Selector (KJV, NKJV, NIV, ESV, NASB, NLT, CSB, AMP)
- 🕐 Time input for tasks
- 🤖 AI Faith Assistant (GROQ mixtral-8x7b-32768)
- ❓ AI Service Guide
- 🎨 Improved UI visibility with larger fonts and better contrast
- Task management with daily verses
- Prayer tracker with daily prompts & streak
- Bible study planner with daily suggestions
- Spiritual balance tracker

### Installation
1. Download the APK below
2. Open it on your Android device
3. Enable "Install from unknown sources" if prompted
4. Tap Install

### Download
[believersguidelite.apk](https://github.com/ecoinboxhub/Christian_task_manager/releases/download/v2.0.0/believersguidelite.apk) (3.6 MB)
